name: Marcus Bell
goals: Steady work and my own place.
profile_summary: Marcus, 38, released to Brooklyn after 6 years. Has a birth certificate, no state ID, no phone. Warehouse and basic cooking skills. Priority: get the ID, then housing, then job.

name: Tanya Williams
goals: Renew my HHA cert and get back to work.
profile_summary: Tanya, 41, on track. Documents in hand. Working on HHA recertification and finding a fair-chance home-care employer.

name: Andre Jackson
goals: Finish OSHA-10 and start the apprenticeship.
profile_summary: Andre, 33, nearly done. ID and benefits set. OSHA-10 in progress. Has an apprenticeship lined up.

name: Keisha Robinson
profile_summary: Keisha, 29. Has gone quiet — no check-in for ~3 weeks. Last completed step was applying for Medicaid.

name: Luis Mendoza
goals: Get on my feet and rebuild.
profile_summary: Luis, 47, brand new. Just released last week. No documents in hand. Long incarceration — needs help with everything.

name: Renée Sims
goals: Get back to my kids and find part-time bookkeeping work.
profile_summary: Renée, 36, single parent. Documents in hand, otherwise stable. Her one unmet need — childcare — is not covered by any resource currently listed in the network.
